import importlib.metadata

print\(''docling-core:'', importlib.metadata.version\(''docling-core''\)\)

from docling.document_converter import DocumentConverter
conv = DocumentConverter\(\)

# Quick test: convert the PDF directly
result = conv.convert\(''geller2001-2002 west meets east early greek and babylonian diagnosis afo 48-49.pdf''\)
doc = result.document

# Explore structure
print\(''Type:'', type\(doc\)\)
print\(''Dir:'', [x for x in dir\(doc\) if not x.startswith\(''_''\)]\)
")
